Notes: Wayne State snaps Concordia-St. Paul's 10-game win streak with 90-78
NSIC women's basketball win.  Erin McCormick scored 24 points and grabbed
10 rebounds for the Wildcats, winners of six straight games.
Kelly Lund had a game-high 26 points for Concordia-St. Paul.
Game.Officials: Dave Klundt,  Rock Messerschmidt,  Scott Long
